response.justification: While an excellent general software engineer with 15+ years of experience and senior-level roles, the candidate fails to meet critical required qualifications. Most critically, there is no indication of Japanese language proficiency, which is explicitly required. Additionally, the entire career has been web and backend-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), with minimal demonstrated experience in embedded firmware, security technologies, or networking protocols that are fundamental to this embedded LAN-switch security role.
strengths: 15+ years of software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems at senior/staff level
C/C++ and Linux systems experience, plus strong foundation in systems-level programming languages like D
Proven ability to own complex projects end-to-end and lead in senior roles across multiple organizations
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language proficiency, a required qualification; languages listed are English, Romanian, and German only
Career predominantly web and backend-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, React); no demonstrated expertise in embedded firmware, security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption), or tamper detection
No demonstrated experience with networking protocols (L2/L3, SNMP, NETCONF), switch operations, or Linux kernel investigation/modification required for the role
